decisions.decision: Affiliate URL injection is now deterministic — system appends 'Shop today: {shortUrl}' AFTER AI copy
decisions.rationale: AI-included URLs were unreliable and bypassed UTM tracking

decisions.decision: IG vendor captions derived at publish time by stripping URLs and appending 'Shop, link in bio.'
decisions.rationale: IG doesn't support clickable URLs in captions; no DB migration needed

decisions.decision: SHORT_URL_BASE env var controls the short link domain (go.mpostly.co)
decisions.rationale: Allows staging/prod to use different short link bases without code changes
